description: Composition Ethnic print sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, has a slightly distressed print, stitch detailing around the armhole and the bateau neckline, velvet tape and stitch detailing on the front extending from the neckline to the hemline, border print panel attached towards the hemline, and has split side hems Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Dry inside out in shade Warm iron This piece of art by w is designed to accentuate your femininity. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it when hanging out with your friends by teaming it with denims and pumps for a casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtis Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
